mapper.select: select model_id, model_name, model_code, api_key, api_url, is_enabled, create_time, update_time from sys_ai_model order by model_id
select model_id, model_name, model_code, api_key, api_url, is_enabled, create_time, update_time from sys_ai_model where is_enabled = 1 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_ai_model (model_name, model_code, api_key, api_url, is_enabled) values (#{modelName}, #{modelCode}, #{apiKey}, #{apiUrl}, #{isEnabled})
